ocr_findings.description: Image reads 'コレが出る！' in the 試験には...が出る！ banner; OCR transcribes as 'つしか出る！' — stylized font misread, losing the standard label used throughout the book.
Graph image (売上/費用 axes with 損益分岐点 plotted) rendered as img-0.jpeg placeholder — numeric axis values and intersection point not captured in text, but graph is inherently non-textual.

reviewer_notes: Page covers 損益分岐点 calculation method with y=ax+b formula and cake-shop worked example. Mathematical formulas rendered as LaTeX ($$...$$) which is acceptable. The 'コレ→つしか' substitution in the callout banner is a recurring stylized-font misread; semantics of body text are intact.
